title: Allahabad High Court RO ARO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 543 Review Officer, Assistant Review Officer & Computer Assistant Posts
short_info: The High Court of Judicature at Allahabad has released an official advertisement for Review Officer (RO), Assistant Review Officer (ARO), and Computer Assistant positions under 'The Allahabad High Court Officer and Staff (Condition of Service and Conduct) Rules, 1976' (as amended from time to time).

important_dates.examination date: Will be intimated via online admit cards only

age_limit.details: Age Limit: As on July 1, 2026 - 21 to 35 years for RO and ARO; 18 to 35 years for Computer Assistant. | Age Relaxation: Maximum age limit for SC/ST and other reserved category candidates of Uttar Pradesh will be enhanced as per the 1976 Rules. | Reservation: Vertical reservation for SC, ST, OBC, and EWS of UP and Horizontal reservation as per 1976 Rules shall be applicable.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications specified for all three posts: | Educational Qualification: Bachelor's Degree from a University established by law in India, or a qualification recognized as equivalent thereto. Computer Qualification: Diploma/Degree in Computer Science from a recognized Institution/University established by law in India, OR 'O' Level Certificate awarded by NIELIT/DOEACC Society, OR 'CCC' Certificate in Computer Science from a recognized institute established by law in India. Computer Skills: Knowledge of Data Entry, Word Processing, and Computer Operation. Typing Speed: Minimum typing speed of 25 words per minute in English Typing on Computer.

salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include: | #Minimum vacancies to be filled by direct recruitment, subject to increase upon any legislative amendments. The number of vacancies in each category may increase or decrease.

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete the online application process as follows:
Visit the official website: www.allahabadhighcourt.in or https://exams.nta.nic.in/allhcre.
Fill the online application form completely between June 1, 2026 and June 21, 2026.
Pay the application fee online on or before June 22, 2026.
Candidates applying for more than one post must submit separate applications with separate fees for each post.
Take a printout of the submitted application and retain it for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Allahabad High Court RO/ARO/Computer Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window closes on 21 June 2026. Fee payment is accepted up to 22 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for RO, ARO and Computer Assistant?
faq.answer: Total vacancies announced: 543 (Review Officer 138, Assistant Review Officer 380, Computer Assistant 25). Numbers are indicative and may change.

faq.question: Q3. Where can I apply and download the official notification?
faq.answer: Apply online at the Allahabad High Court portal or NTA recruitment site: https://allahabadhighcourt.in/ or https://exams.nta.nic.in/allhcre. Download the advertisement/notification from the official website.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: A Bachelor’s Degree from a university established by law in India (or equivalent). Additionally, a recognised computer qualification: Diploma/Degree in Computer Science, NIELIT ‘O’ Level, or CCC certificate.

faq.question: Q5. Is there a typing speed requirement?
faq.answer: Yes. Minimum English typing speed of 25 words per minute on computer is mandatory.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit and are there relaxations?
faq.answer: Age as on 01-07-2026: RO & ARO — 21 to 35 years; Computer Assistant — 18 to 35 years. Age relaxations for SC/ST/OBC and other reserved categories of Uttar Pradesh apply as per rules under the 1976 Act.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for each category?
faq.answer: General/ OBC: ₹1,200 per post (bank charges extra). SC/ST/EWS of Uttar Pradesh: ₹1,000 per post (bank charges extra). Separate fee is required for each post if applying to more than one.

faq.question: Q8. What is the pay scale for these posts?
faq.answer: Pay scales (7th CPC): Review Officer — Level 8 (₹47,600–₹1,51,100); Assistant Review Officer — Level 7 (₹44,900–₹1,42,400); Computer Assistant — Level 4 (₹25,500–₹81,100).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for recruitment?
faq.answer: Selection is through a recruitment examination/written test conducted as per Allahabad High Court rules. Exam details, date and admit card information will be notified online; final selection is based on performance in the exam and rules of the Court.

faq.question: Q10. How do I apply and what documents are required?
faq.answer: Apply online between 01–21 June 2026 at the official portal. Pay fee by 22 June 2026. Keep scanned copies of educational certificates, computer qualification, identity proof, recent photograph, and any category (SC/ST/OBC/EWS) certificates ready. If applying for multiple posts, submit separate applications and fees.
